cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.10)

project(edgeDeploy)

include(GNUInstallDirs)

list(APPEND CMAKE_MODULE_PATH ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/cmake)

set(EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/edgeDeploy/include)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_INFER_INCLUDE_DIR ${EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR}/infer)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_MODEL_INCLUDE_DIR ${EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR}/modelEngine)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_STREAM_INCLUDE_DIR ${EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR}/stream)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_UTILS_INCLUDE_DIR ${EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR}/utils)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_DIR ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/example)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_WEIGHTS_DIR ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_DIR}/weights)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_IMAGES_DIR ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_DIR}/images)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_VIDEO_DIR ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_DIR}/video)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_PUBLIC_HEADERS
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INFER_INCLUDE_DIR}/ed_common.h
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INFER_INCLUDE_DIR}/edgeInfer.h
)

set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME hardhat)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_TARGET edgeDeploy_${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}_demo)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_SOURCE ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_DIR}/${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}_detect_demo.cpp)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_TARGET edgeDeploy_${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}_video_demo)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_SOURCE ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_DIR}/${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}_video_demo.cpp)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_MODEL ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_WEIGHTS_DIR}/${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}_detect_yolov8s.rknn)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_CONFIG_TEMPLATE ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_WEIGHTS_DIR}/${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}Ware.demo.json.in)
set(EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_CONFIG_OUTPUT ${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated/${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}Ware.json)


# ── 第三方：FFmpeg（仅用于 RTSP demux，解码由 MPP 承担）──
find_package(PkgConfig REQUIRED)
pkg_check_modules(FFMPEG REQUIRED IMPORTED_TARGET
    libavformat
    libavcodec
    libavutil
)
find_package(MPP REQUIRED)

# Build notes:
# - `edgeDeploy` is built as a shared library and installed to `install/lib`.
# - `${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_TARGET}` is a runnable example linked against `libedgeDeploy.so`
#   and installed to `install/`.
# - Demo assets are packaged from `example/weights` and `example/images` into
#   `install/weights` and `install/images`.
# - The generated `${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_NAME}Ware.json` points to the installed RKNN model path.

configure_file(
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_CONFIG_TEMPLATE}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_CONFIG_OUTPUT}
    @ONLY
)

if (ENABLE_ASAN)
	message(STATUS "BUILD WITH ADDRESS SANITIZER")
	set (CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_C_FLAGS_DEBUG} -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fsanitize=address")
	set (CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_CXX_FLAGS_DEBUG} -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fsanitize=address")
	set (CMAKE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG "${CMAKE_LINKER_FLAGS_DEBUG} -fno-omit-frame-pointer -fsanitize=address")
endif ()



add_subdirectory(${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/3rdparty/ 3rdparty.out)

set(CMAKE_INSTALL_RPATH "$ORIGIN/../lib")


file(GLOB_RECURSE SRCS 
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/edgeDeploy/src/*.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/edgeDeploy/src/*.cc
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/edgeDeploy/src/*.cpp
)

if(DISABLE_RGA AND NOT (TARGET_SOC STREQUAL "rv1106" OR TARGET_SOC STREQUAL "rv1103" OR TARGET_SOC STREQUAL "rv1103b"))
    add_definitions(-DDISABLE_RGA)
endif ()

# only RGA on rv1106 and rk3588 support handle
if (TARGET_SOC STREQUAL "rv1106" OR TARGET_SOC STREQUAL "rk3588")
    add_definitions(-DLIBRGA_IM2D_HANDLE)
endif()


add_library(${PROJECT_NAME} SHARED
    ${SRCS}
)

target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME}
    PkgConfig::FFMPEG
    MPP::mpp
    ${LIBRKNNRT}
    ${LIBJPEG}
    ${LIBRGA}
    ${LIBSNDFILE}
    dl
)

target_compile_definitions(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ZERO_COPY)

message(STATUS "!!!!!!!!!!!CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME: ${CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME}")
if (CMAKE_SYSTEM_NAME STREQUAL "Linux")
    set(THREADS_PREFER_PTHREAD_FLAG ON)
    find_package(Threads REQUIRED)
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} Threads::Threads)
endif()

# Freetype config (used for drawing text strings onto CPU canvas)
find_package(Freetype)
if(FREETYPE_FOUND)
    message(STATUS "Freetype found: ${FREETYPE_INCLUDE_DIRS}")
    target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE ${FREETYPE_INCLUDE_DIRS})
    target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} ${FREETYPE_LIBRARIES})
endif()

target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INFER_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_MODEL_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_STREAM_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_UTILS_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${LIBRKNNRT_INCLUDES}
    ${LIBJPEG_INCLUDES}
    ${LIBRGA_INCLUDES}
    ${LIBSNDFILE_INCLUDES}
    ${STB_INCLUDES}
    ${SPDLOG_INCLUDES}
    ${NLOHMANN_INCLUDES}
)

add_executable(${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_TARGET}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_SOURCE}
)

add_executable(${EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_TARGET}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_SOURCE}
)

target_include_directories(${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_TARGET} PRIVATE
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INFER_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_UTILS_INCLUDE_DIR}
)

target_include_directories(${EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_TARGET} PRIVATE
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_INFER_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_STREAM_INCLUDE_DIR}
    ${EDGEDEPLOY_UTILS_INCLUDE_DIR}
)

target_link_libraries(${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_TARGET} PRIVATE
    ${PROJECT_NAME}
)

target_link_libraries(${EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_TARGET} PRIVATE
    ${PROJECT_NAME}
    PkgConfig::FFMPEG
    MPP::mpp
)

set_target_properties(${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_TARGET} PROPERTIES
    BUILD_RPATH "$ORIGIN/lib"
    INSTALL_RPATH "$ORIGIN/lib"
)

set_target_properties(${EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_TARGET} PROPERTIES
    BUILD_RPATH "$ORIGIN/lib"
    INSTALL_RPATH "$ORIGIN/lib"
)


install(TARGETS ${PROJECT_NAME}
    LIBRARY DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_LIBDIR}
)
install(TARGETS ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_TARGET}
    RUNTIME DESTINATION .
)
install(TARGETS ${EDGEDEPLOY_VIDEO_EXAMPLE_TARGET}
    RUNTIME DESTINATION .
)
install(FILES ${EDGEDEPLOY_PUBLIC_HEADERS} DESTINATION ${CMAKE_INSTALL_INCLUDEDIR}/infer)
install(FILES ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_CONFIG_OUTPUT} DESTINATION weights)
install(FILES ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_MODEL} DESTINATION weights)
install(DIRECTORY ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_IMAGES_DIR}/ DESTINATION images)
install(DIRECTORY ${EDGEDEPLOY_EXAMPLE_VIDEO_DIR}/ DESTINATION video)

install(FILES ${RKNN_FILES} DESTINATION model)
